title: Video Script Schema
description: Schema for validating the 04-script structured block

anti_hype_forbidden.description: Marketing/clickbait phrases the 04 script bans; downstream stages (TTS, assembly, subtitle) must not re-introduce them. Enforced by scripts/pipeline_lint.py.

track.description: A-rail (Concept animation), B-rail (OS screen recording), or A/B (split) / A+B (composited) mix

visual_instructions.description: Visual scene prompt or Remotion code instructions

visual_beats.description: Anti-deadtime sub-shot timeline. RECOMMENDED whenever duration_hint_seconds > 15: each beat marks a visible visual change so the shot never stays static longer than ~15s. See shared/docs/remotion-spec.md §1.5.

at_seconds.description: Seconds from this section's start when the visual change happens

action.description: The visible change, e.g. 'stagger row in', 'zoom focus', 'highlight_cell', 'switch component', 'B-roll cut-in'

highlights_pitfall.description: Does the script explicitly show a failure moment/pitfall?

explains_boundary.description: Does the script define the boundary of what AI can/cannot do?

acceptance_standard.description: Does the script explain how the human verifies/accepts the code?
